proposed_relations.description: The Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study includes a claim about the effects of a proposed bus lane on car and bus traffic at intersections along Hylan Boulevard.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the effects of a bus lane on traffic for Northbound and Southbound movements during their respective peak periods.

decisions.rationale: The claim text describes the effects of a proposed bus lane on Hylan Boulevard traffic, and the evidence block p004_c0004 is a figure from the Hylan Boulevard Transportation Improvement Study. The project record project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study is the canonical subject for this source. No existing has_claim relation exists for this claim.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The diagram illustrates the effects of a bus lane on traffic for Northbound and Southbound movements during their respective peak periods.

decisions.rationale: This claim already has an existing has_claim relation in the registry: has_claim project_hylan-blvd-transportation-improvement-study -> claim_hcs-through-traffic-only. No new relation is needed.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Data illustrates Highway Capacity Software analysis of through traffic movement only.
